mapper.select: SELECT RIGHT('00000' + CAST(ISNULL(MAX(CAST(CAMP_NO AS INT)), 0) + 1 AS VARCHAR), 5) FROM CAMPAIGN_MST WHERE CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD}

SELECT A.CAMP_NO, A.CAMP_NM, A.SURV_GB, B.CODENM AS SURVGBNM, A.ACTDATE, A.REMARK, A.STATUS, A.START_MENT, A.END_MENT FROM CAMPAIGN_MST A LEFT JOIN HABA900T_TBL B ON A.SURV_GB = B.CODECD AND B.CDTYPE = '910' WHERE A.CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD} AND A.CAMP_NM LIKE '%' + #{CAMP_NM} + '%' ORDER BY A.CAMP_NO DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CAMPAIGN_MST (CMPYCD, CAMP_NO, CAMP_NM, SURV_GB, ACTDATE, REMARK, STATUS, START_MENT, END_MENT, ADDTIME, UPDTIME, UPDEMP) VALUES (#{cmpycd}, #{camp_no}, #{camp_nm}, #{surv_gb}, #{actdate}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{start_ment}, #{end_ment}, GETDATE(), GETDATE(), #{updemp})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM CAMPAIGN_MST WHERE CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD} AND CAMP_NO = #{CAMP_NO}
mapper.select: SELECT RIGHT('00000' + CAST(ISNULL(MAX(CAST(SURV_NO AS INT)), 0) + 1 AS VARCHAR), 5) FROM SURV_MST WHERE CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD}

SELECT A.SURV_NO, A.QUESTION, A.ANS_TP, A.DSPORD, A.USEYN, (SELECT STUFF((SELECT ', ' + ANS_CONT FROM SURV_DTL WHERE CMPYCD = A.CMPYCD AND SURV_NO = A.SURV_NO AND USEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY ANS_NO FOR XML PATH('')), 1, 2, '')) AS ANSWERS FROM SURV_MST A WHERE A.CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD} ORDER BY A.DSPORD, A.SURV_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SURV_MST (CMPYCD, SURV_NO, QUESTION, ANS_TP, DSPORD, USEYN, ADDTIME, UPDTIME, UPDEMP) VALUES (#{cmpycd}, #{surv_no}, #{question}, #{ans_tp}, #{dspord}, #{useyn}, GETDATE(), GETDATE(), #{updemp})
mapper.update: UPDATE SURV_MST SET QUESTION = #{question}, ANS_TP = #{ans_tp}, DSPORD = #{dspord}, USEYN = #{useyn}, UPDTIME = GETDATE(), UPDEMP = #{updemp} WHERE CMPYCD = #{cmpycd} AND SURV_NO = #{surv_no}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SURV_MST WHERE CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD} AND SURV_NO = #{SURV_NO}
mapper.select: SELECT ANS_NO, ANS_CONT, ANS_POINT, USEYN, ESSAY_YN FROM SURV_DTL WHERE CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD} AND SURV_NO = #{SURV_NO} ORDER BY ANS_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SURV_DTL (CMPYCD, SURV_NO, ANS_NO, ANS_CONT, ANS_POINT, USEYN, ESSAY_YN, ADDTIME, UPDTIME, UPDEMP) VALUES (#{cmpycd}, #{surv_no}, #{ans_no}, #{ans_cont}, #{ans_point}, #{useyn}, #{essay_yn}, GETDATE(), GETDATE(), #{updemp})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SURV_DTL WHERE CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD} AND SURV_NO = #{SURV_NO}
mapper.select: SELECT A.CODECD, A.CODENM, COUNT(B.SURV_NO) AS Q_CNT FROM HABA900T_TBL A LEFT JOIN CAMP_SURVEY B ON A.CODECD = B.SURV_GB AND B.CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD} WHERE A.CDTYPE = '910' AND A.USEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY A.CODECD, A.CODENM, A.DSPORD ORDER BY A.DSPORD

SELECT A.SURV_NO, B.QUESTION, A.SORTCD, B.ANS_TP FROM CAMP_SURVEY A JOIN SURV_MST B ON A.CMPYCD = B.CMPYCD AND A.SURV_NO = B.SURV_NO WHERE A.CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD} AND A.SURV_GB = #{SURV_GB} ORDER BY A.SORTCD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CAMP_SURVEY (CMPYCD, SURV_GB, SURV_NO, SORTCD, USEYN, ADDTIME, UPDTIME, UPDEMP) VALUES (#{CMPYCD}, #{SURV_GB}, #{SURV_NO}, #{SORTCD}, #{USEYN}, GETDATE(), GETDATE(), #{UPDEMP})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM CAMP_SURVEY WHERE CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD} AND SURV_GB = #{SURV_GB}
mapper.select: SELECT CMPYCD, SURV_GB, ATTR_NM, ATTR_KEY, DATA_TYPE, STATS_YN, USEYN FROM CAMP_ATTR_MAPPER WHERE CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD} AND SURV_GB = #{SURV_GB} ORDER BY ATTR_KEY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CAMP_ATTR_MAPPER (CMPYCD, SURV_GB, ATTR_NM, ATTR_KEY, DATA_TYPE, STATS_YN, USEYN, ADDTIME, UPDTIME, UPDEMP) VALUES (#{cmpycd}, #{surv_gb}, #{attr_nm}, #{attr_key}, #{data_type}, #{stats_yn}, #{useyn}, GETDATE(), GETDATE(), #{updemp})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM CAMP_ATTR_MAPPER WHERE CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD} AND SURV_GB = #{SURV_GB}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO CAMPAIGN_CALL_LIST (CMPYCD, CAMP_NO, SURV_GB, CUST_NM, EMAIL, TEL_NO, STATUS, RSLT_CD, USERID, EXT_DATA, ADDTIME, UPDTIME, UPDEMP) VALUES
(#{item.CMPYCD}, #{item.CAMP_NO}, #{item.SURV_GB}, #{item.CUST_NM}, #{item.EMAIL}, #{item.TEL_NO}, #{item.STATUS}, #{item.RSLT_CD}, #{item.USERID}, #{item.EXT_DATA, typeHandler=com.crmbank.global.handler.JsonTypeHandler}, GETDATE(), GETDATE(), #{item.UPDEMP})
mapper.update: UPDATE CAMPAIGN_CALL_LIST SET RSLT_CD = #{RSLT_CD}, STATUS = #{STATUS}, UPDTIME = GETDATE() WHERE CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD} AND CALL_SEQ = #{CALL_SEQ}
mapper.select: SELECT A.SURV_NO AS SURV_NO, B.QUESTION AS QUESTION, B.ANS_TP AS ANS_TP, A.SORTCD AS SORTCD, (SELECT STUFF((SELECT ' / ' + CAST(ANS_NO AS VARCHAR) + ':' + ANS_CONT FROM SURV_DTL WHERE CMPYCD = A.CMPYCD AND SURV_NO = A.SURV_NO AND USEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY ANS_NO FOR XML PATH('')), 1, 3, '')) AS ANSWERS FROM CAMP_SURVEY A JOIN SURV_MST B ON A.CMPYCD = B.CMPYCD AND A.SURV_NO = B.SURV_NO WHERE A.CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD} AND A.SURV_GB = #{SURV_GB} AND A.USEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.SORTCD
SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOT_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = '010' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS READY_CNT FROM CAMPAIGN_CALL_LIST WHERE CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD} AND CAMP_NO = #{CAMP_NO}

SELECT B.CODECD AS RSLT_CD, B.CODENM AS RSLT_NM, COUNT(A.CALL_SEQ) AS CNT FROM HABA900T_TBL B LEFT JOIN CAMPAIGN_CALL_LIST A ON A.CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD} AND A.CAMP_NO = #{CAMP_NO} AND A.RSLT_CD = B.CODECD WHERE B.CDTYPE = '920' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY B.CODECD, B.CODENM, B.DSPORD ORDER BY B.DSPORD ASC

SELECT X.CUST_NM, A.START_TIME AS ADDTIME, ISNULL(C.CODENM, '미처리') AS RSLT_NM, A.MEDIA_TYPE, ISNULL(B.REMARK, '') AS MEMO, A.INTERACTION_ID FROM TOTAL_INTERACTION_LOG A JOIN CAMPAIGN_CALL_LIST X ON A.CMPYCD = X.CMPYCD AND X.CALL_SEQ = #{CALL_SEQ} LEFT JOIN CAMPAIGN_RSLT_MST B ON A.INTERACTION_ID = B.INTERACTION_ID LEFT JOIN HABA900T_TBL C ON C.CDTYPE = '920' AND A.RESULT_CD = C.CODECD WHERE A.CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD} AND ( (A.KEYWORD = X.TEL_NO AND X.TEL_NO IS NOT NULL AND X.TEL_NO != '') OR (A.KEYWORD = X.EMAIL AND X.EMAIL IS NOT NULL AND X.EMAIL != '') ) ORDER BY A.START_TIME DESC
SELECT CODECD, CODENM FROM HABA900T_TBL WHERE CDTYPE = #{CDTYPE} AND USEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY DSPORD

SELECT A.SURV_NO, B.QUESTION, B.ANS_TP, B.DSPORD, B.USEYN, (SELECT STUFF((SELECT ', ' + ANS_CONT FROM SURV_DTL WHERE CMPYCD = B.CMPYCD AND SURV_NO = B.SURV_NO AND USEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY ANS_NO FOR XML PATH('')), 1, 2, '')) AS ANSWERS FROM CAMP_SURVEY A LEFT OUTER JOIN SURV_MST B ON A.CMPYCD = B.CMPYCD AND A.SURV_NO = B.SURV_NO WHERE A.CMPYCD = #{CMPYCD} AND SURV_GB = #{SURV_GB}
